net.milkbowl.vault2.economy

    • Field Detail

      • amount

        public final BigDecimal amount
        Amount modified by calling method

      • type

        public final EconomyResponse.ResponseType type
        Success or failure of call. Using Enum of ResponseType to determine valid outcomes

      • errorMessage

        public final String errorMessage
        Error message if the variable 'type' is ResponseType.FAILURE

    • Constructor Detail

      • MultiEconomyResponse

        public MultiEconomyResponse(BigDecimal amount,
                            EconomyResponse.ResponseType type,
                            String errorMessage)

    • Method Detail

      • addBalance

        public void addBalance(UUID uuid,
                       BigDecimal amount)
        Updates the balance of the entity identified by the specified UUID. If a balance already exists for the UUID, it will be replaced with the given amount.
        Parameters:
        uuid - the unique identifier of the entity whose balance is to be updated
        amount - the new balance amount to associate with the specified UUID

      • balance

        public Optional<BigDecimal> balance(UUID uuid)
        Retrieves the balance associated with the specified UUID.
        Parameters:
        uuid - the unique identifier of the entity whose balance is to be fetched
        Returns:
        an Optional containing the balance if it exists, or an empty Optional if no balance is found

      • amount

        public BigDecimal amount()

      • type

        public EconomyResponse.ResponseType type()

      • errorMessage

        public String errorMessage()
